column1: 1. Only 10.8% of 125,589 calls yielded usable data. 89.2% lost to consent refusal or early hang-up. Consent strategy needs urgent review.
2. Water Received Daily (Q1) satisfaction is critically low at 32.1%. Only 1 in 3 households report receiving water daily.
3. Consistent Timing (Q4) is the strongest KPI at 73.4% Ś when water arrives, timing is relatively predictable.
4. Only 882 of 4,289 schemes (20.6%) have statistically valid scores. 3,407 schemes need re-calling in Phase 3.
5. 71.7% of Q1=No calls have blank days_without_water Ś matching Phase 1 (71.8%). Bot still failing to capture this field.
